title: 工具执行失败: read_file
content:
--- 文件: core/memory_layers.py (第 180 至 235 行，共 570 行) ---
 180 |         self.storage_dir = Path(storage_dir)
 181 |         self.storage_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
 182 | 
 183 |         # 内存索引：{session_id: file_path}
 184 |         self.index: Dict[str, Path] = {}
 185 | 
 186 |         # MemoryItem 索引：{memory_item_id: file_path}
 187 |         self.item_index: Dict[str, Path] = {}
 188 | 
 189 |         # 倒排索引：{keyword: [session_ids]}
 190 |         self.inverted_index: Dict[str, List[str]] = {}
 191 | 
 192 |         # MemoryItem 倒排索引：{keyword: [memory_item_ids]}
 193 |         self.item_inverted_index: Dict[str, List[str]] = {}
 194 | 
 195 |         # 初始化时加载索引
 196 |         self._load_index()
 197 | 
 198 |     def _load_index(self):
 199 |         """从磁盘加载索引"""
 200 |         index_file = self.storage_dir / "index.json"
 201 |         if index_file.exists():
 202 |             try:
 203 |                 with open(index_file, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
 204 |                     data = json.load(f)
 205 |                     self.index = {k: Path(v) for k, v in data.get("index", {}).items()}
 206 |                     self.item_index = {k: Path(v) for k, v in data.get("item_index", {}).items()}
 207 |                     self.inverted_index = data.get("inverted_index", {})
 208 |                     self.item_inverted_index = data.get("item_inverted_index", {})
 209 |             except Exception as e:
 210 |                 # 如果加载失败，重建索引
 211 |                 print(f"⚠️ 加载索引失败，将重建索引: {e}")
 212 |                 self._rebuild_index()
 213 | 
 214 |     def _save_index(self):
 215 |         """保存索引到磁盘"""
 216 |         index_file = self.storage_dir / "index.json"
 217 |         try:
 218 |             with open(index_file, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
 219 |                 json.dump({
 220 |                     "index": {k: str(v) for k, v in self.index.items()},
 221 |                     "item_index": {k: str(v) for k, v in self.item_index.items()},
 222 |                     "inverted_index": self.inverted_index,
 223 |                     "item_inverted_index": self.item_inverted_index
 224 |                 }, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
 225 |         except Exception as e:
 226 |             print(f"⚠️ 保存索引失败: {e}")
 227 | 
 228 |     def _rebuild_index(self):
 229 |         """重建索引"""
 230 |         self.index.clear()
 231 |         self.item_index.clear()
 232 |         self.inverted_index.clear()
 233 |         self.item_inverted_index.clear()
 234 | 
 235 |         # 遍历所有摘要文件
--- 读取完毕 ---
